summary: Iteration 13 — signed file URLs, reports router extraction, and quick-WhatsApp send. All 12 pytest cases pass (100%). Frontend quick-send button on report cards works end-to-end (200 response + toast). Modularisation smoke check confirms no @api.post('/reports/...') decorators remain in server.py.
critical_code_review_comments: Signed URL: exp+sig verification uses constant-time compare via '==' on the HMAC hex — recommend hmac.compare_digest to avoid timing attacks (minor).
reports.py _send_batch: only first 10 errors captured — fine, but the outer response echoes numbers as-is; consider logging report_id for auditability.
server.py still 1227 lines — further extraction (files/, projects/, workforce/) would help maintainability but not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Ensured user test-user-karya1 has profile_complete=true, phone=+919999912345, default_client_phone=+919888812345. Upserted project id=proj-quick-1 (owner test-user-karya1, client_phone=+919999900001). Test itself creates & tears down proj-nophone-1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13.py as regression for signed-URL, reports CRUD, whatsapp send + quick send. sign_file_path/build_signed_file_url are importable from server. Twilio unconfigured is expected — response {sent:0, errors:['Twilio not configured…'], recipients:[…]} is the happy path.

verification_evidence.reports_router_paths: /api/reports/generate, GET /api/reports, GET/DELETE /api/reports/{id}, POST /api/reports/{id}/whatsapp, POST /api/reports/{id}/whatsapp/quick — all reachable
